parameters.content:
# INITIALIZE ATEM

The ATEM starts non-streaming, thats how we know it is not initialised yet.
We initialize it and start the stream to restreamer.

parameters.content:
# INITIALIZE PI
The PI boots with the browser showing a certain html. "data:text/html...." this is where we know it have just booted.

nodes.name: wait for livestream buffer to finish

parameters.content: If the system was stopped without the streams stopped, it would just continue streaming... And thats unfortunate.

## START / RESUME Session
Enable audio, stop video playback, start recording, etc.

### Navigated away
When we were in "PRE STREAM" or "BREAK" mode (not recording just streaming some pre-recorded stugg), the way we get out of those is to trigger the navigated away entrypoint of this wf.

If they pull up the camera or the slides, or anything that triggers this, then we'd resume the session.
